text_original: the texts are very weak, it is not clear what is what, but it is enough to dive into my own world c.ai faha it was good but still
text_zh: 文本非常弱，分不清什么是什么，但足够让我沉浸在自己的世界里。c.ai 哈哈 挺好的，但还是……
reply_original: Hi there! Thank you for your honest feedback. We're glad Fantasia helps you dive into your own world, but we're sorry the text quality fell short. We are constantly working to improve our AI's depth and clarity. Please share any specific examples or suggestions with us at support@fantachat.ai so we can make it better for you!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢您的坦诚反馈。我们很高兴 Fantasia 能帮助您沉浸在自己的世界里，但对于文本质量未能达到预期，我们深表歉意。我们一直在努力提升 AI 的深度和清晰度。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享任何具体的例子或建议，以便我们为您做得更好！
